query_normalized: predictive coding llms: implementing hierarchical error minimization computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on Continual Learning and catastrophic forgetting in Recurrent Neural Networks, which is a distinct construct from Predictive Coding and hierarchical error minimization in LLMs. It does not measure the same mechanism or variables, falling under the rejection rule for distinct constructs sharing only high-level keywords like "Learning" and "Neural Networks."
